scenarios.title: Phase 1 — conversation-driven PRD intake plays real content

steps.text: A scene 'Idea → PRD + mockups' (eyebrow 'PRODUCT MANAGER') shows an embedded kitsoki tour.

evidence.observation: Eyebrow '1 · PRODUCT MANAGER', title 'Idea → PRD + mockups', embedded kitsoki web UI with a video scrubber (15.6s / 29.1s) and caption 'Conversation-driven PRD intake on the slidey repo'.

steps.text: The tour shows the real conversational PRD intake: a typed slidey idea, clarifying Q&A and/or a prior-art scan, and a drafted/published PRD — not a blank/loading screen.

evidence.observation: Chat bubble with a typed slidey idea about a 'printable per-scene notes handout', a tour card 'Scan for prior art first', state-diagram rows core.prd.search / core.prd.clarifying.
'Clarifications — Round 1' with numbered questions about the primary actor and success metric.
PRD panel '# PRD — Speaker-Notes Export' with 'PUBLISHED' badge and 'Published to slidey's docs/prd' tour card; 'Your PRD is published … docs/prd/speaker-notes-export.md'.

steps.text: A scene 'Requirements → design' (eyebrow 'ARCHITECT') shows an embedded tour.

evidence.observation: Eyebrow '2 · ARCHITECT', title 'Requirements → design', embedded UI with scrubber 14.1s/14.1s and caption 'PRD → design epic, slices, and ADRs'.

steps.text: The tour shows the design phase: design intake/refine and a published design (epic/slices/ADRs).

evidence.observation: State diagram rows core.design_search SEARCHING, core.design_materialize PREPARING, core.design_refine BRIEF, core.design_draft DRAFTING, core.design_done PUBLISHED.
Chat 'Author a design for the PRD at — describe or expand it to start the search', tour card 'Carry the PRD into design', 'Overlap scan' / 'No new spec derived output'.
'Design published + feature ticket' tour card; chat shows 'PUBLISHED' and a created feature ticket with Title/Kind/Ticket fields.

scenarios.title: Phase 3 — design decomposed into a work plan

steps.text: A scene 'Design → work plan' (eyebrow 'DECOMPOSITION') shows an embedded tour.

evidence.observation: Eyebrow '3 · DEVELOPER · DECOMPOSITION', title 'Design → work plan', embedded UI with scrubber 3.3s/3.3s and caption 'Design epic decomposed into agent-sized briefs'.

steps.text: The tour shows the decomposition: configure/decompose into agent-sized briefs.

evidence.observation: State diagram lint → fleet.load with 'fleet__start → fleet.board', chat 'Deliver an epic end-to-end: decompose it into briefs' and 'artifacts/deliver/decomposition.yaml'.
Tour card 'Decompose → lint → load: Start fans the epic into three dependency-ordered briefs — a SceneNotes model, a handout renderer, and a --notes CLI flag'.
Tour card 'A validated work plan: three briefs loaded from .artifacts/deliver/decomposition.yaml, dependency-ordered and gate-bearing'.

steps.text: A scene 'Bug → reproduce → fix → validate' shows an embedded tour of the bug-fix pipeline on a real slidey bug (implement/test/validate visible).

evidence.observation: Eyebrow '4 · DEVELOPER · BUG FIX', title 'Bug → reproduce → fix → validate', state diagram bf.proposing/implementing/testing/reviewing/validating/shipped PR-READY; chat text 'grid-cards fallback from `?? 30` to `?? 20`' and 'regression test'; caption 'The bug-fix pipeline on a real slidey bug'.
Tour card 'Implement the file: the agent edits etc/timing.js …', diff/changes with 'test/timing.test.js — regression test'.

steps.text: A scene about spatial refine shows the rendered deck poster with an annotation overlay (boxed elements), demonstrating location-tied review.

evidence.observation: Rendered poster ('ZEN GARDEN UNION') with a SemanticOverlay of boxed elements labeled 'semantic_element', 'region', and 'point'; tour card 'Poster-backed semantic overlay … each box comes straight from the deck's .semantic.json sidecar'.
Eyebrow '5 · DEVELOPER · REFINE', title 'Demo videos → spatial refine', caption 'Annotate the rendered frame → an anchored refine pass'; poster with annotation boxes visible.

steps.text: A scene about shipping shows a pull request being opened on the slidey repo (PR id/url, open_pr state), CI, and a merge.

evidence.observation: Tour card 'Open the pull request … the room calls iface.vcs.open_pr', state open_pr; agent fields 'PR id 128', 'PR url https://github.com/kitsoki/slidey/pull/128'; trace host.git.open_pr.

Eyebrow '6 · DEVELOPER · SHIP', title 'Summary → open PR', state diagram ci_monitoring / merge_executing / __exit_merged, trace host.git.open_pr and world.update; caption 'Reproduction + validation summary → pull request'.

scenarios.title: The deck is a coherent six-phase dev story

steps.text: A title slide opens the deck (idea → merged PR on the slidey repo).

evidence.observation: 'KITSOKI · DEV STORY', 'From an idea to a merged PR', 'one feature and one bug, end to end, on the slidey repo', scene 1/15.

steps.text: Six narrated phase slides each precede their tour video (PM, architect, decomposition, bug, refine, ship).

evidence.observation: '1 · PRODUCT MANAGER' precedes tour 03.
'2 · ARCHITECT' precedes tour 05.
'3 · DEVELOPER · DECOMPOSITION' precedes tour 07.
'4 · DEVELOPER · THE INTERRUPT' precedes tour 09.
'5 · DEVELOPER · FEATURE DELIVERY' precedes refine tour 11.
'6 · DEVELOPER · SHIP' precedes ship tour 13.

steps.text: A closing cta slide states every frame is a deterministic, no-LLM replay.

evidence.observation: 'Kitsoki' title, 'Every frame is a deterministic, no-LLM replay', 'the runtime is a state machine; the model is a traceable callee', scene 15/15.
